methods.name: sendRichMessageDraft
methods.description: Use this method to stream a partial rich message to a user while the message is being generated. Note that the streamed draft is ephemeral and acts as a temporary 30-second preview - once the output is finalized, you must call sendRichMessage with the complete message to persist it in the user's chat. Returns True on success.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target private chat

parameters.name: message_thread_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the message draft; must be non-zero. Changes to drafts with the same identifier are animated.

parameters.name: rich_message
parameters.description: The partial message to be streamed

methods.name: answerInlineQuery
methods.description: Use this method to send answers to an inline query. On success, True is returned. No more than 50 results per query are allowed.

parameters.name: inline_query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the answered query

parameters.name: results
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized array of results for the inline query

parameters.name: cache_time
parameters.description: The maximum amount of time in seconds that the result of the inline query may be cached on the server. Defaults to 300.

parameters.name: is_personal
parameters.description: Pass True if results may be cached on the server side only for the user that sent the query. By default, results may be returned to any user who sends the same query.

parameters.name: next_offset
parameters.description: Pass the offset that a client should send in the next query with the same text to receive more results. Pass an empty string if there are no more results or if you don't support pagination. Offset length can't exceed 64 bytes.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object describing a button to be shown above inline query results

methods.name: sendInvoice
methods.description: Use this method to send invoices. On success, the sent Message is returned.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username

parameters.name: message_thread_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum; for forum supergroups and private chats of bots with forum topic mode enabled only

parameters.name: direct_messages_topic_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the direct messages topic to which the message will be sent; required if the message is sent to a direct messages chat

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Product name, 1-32 characters

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Product description, 1-255 characters

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Bot-defined invoice payload, 1-128 bytes. This will not be displayed to the user, use it for your internal processes.

parameters.name: provider_token
parameters.description: Payment provider token, obtained via @BotFather . Pass an empty string for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code, see more on currencies . Pass “XTR” for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: prices
parameters.description: Price breakdown, a JSON-serialized list of components (e.g. product price, tax, discount, delivery cost, delivery tax, bonus, etc.). Must contain exactly one item for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: max_tip_amount
parameters.description: The maximum accepted amount for tips in the smallest units of the currency (integer, not float/double). For example, for a maximum tip of US$ 1.45 pass max_tip_amount = 145 . See the exp parameter in currencies.json , it shows the number of digits past the decimal point for each currency (2 for the majority of currencies). Defaults to 0. Not supported for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: suggested_tip_amounts
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized array of suggested amounts of tips in the smallest units of the currency (integer, not float/double). At most 4 suggested tip amounts can be specified. The suggested tip amounts must be positive, passed in a strictly increased order and must not exceed max_tip_amount .

parameters.name: start_parameter
parameters.description: Unique deep-linking parameter. If left empty, forwarded copies of the sent message will have a Pay button, allowing multiple users to pay directly from the forwarded message, using the same invoice. If non-empty, forwarded copies of the sent message will have a URL button with a deep link to the bot (instead of a Pay button), with the value used as the start parameter.

parameters.name: provider_data
parameters.description: JSON-serialized data about the invoice, which will be shared with the payment provider. A detailed description of required fields should be provided by the payment provider.

parameters.name: photo_url
parameters.description: URL of the product photo for the invoice. Can be a photo of the goods or a marketing image for a service. People like it better when they see what they are paying for.

parameters.name: photo_size
parameters.description: Photo size in bytes

parameters.name: photo_width
parameters.description: Photo width

parameters.name: photo_height
parameters.description: Photo height

parameters.name: need_name
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's full name to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: need_phone_number
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's phone number to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: need_email
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's email address to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: need_shipping_address
parameters.description: Pass True if you require the user's shipping address to complete the order. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: send_phone_number_to_provider
parameters.description: Pass True if the user's phone number should be sent to the provider. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: send_email_to_provider
parameters.description: Pass True if the user's email address should be sent to the provider. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.name: is_flexible
parameters.description: Pass True if the final price depends on the shipping method. Ignored for payments in Telegram Stars .

parameters.description: Sends the message silently . Users will receive a notification with no sound.

parameters.name: protect_content
parameters.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the message effect to be added to the message; for private chats only

parameters.name: suggested_post_parameters
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object containing the parameters of the suggested post to send; for direct messages chats only. If the message is sent as a reply to another suggested post, then that suggested post is automatically declined.

parameters.name: reply_parameters
parameters.description: Description of the message to reply to

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for an inline keyboard . If empty, one 'Pay total price ' button will be shown. If not empty, the first button must be a Pay button.

Currently, it must always be 2592000 (30 days) if specified. methods.name: answerShippingQuery
methods.description: If you sent an invoice requesting a shipping address and the parameter is_flexible was specified, the Bot API will send an Update with a shipping_query field to the bot. Use this method to reply to shipping queries. On success, True is returned.

parameters.name: shipping_query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the query to be answered

parameters.name: ok
parameters.description: Pass True if delivery to the specified address is possible and False if there are any problems (for example, if delivery to the specified address is not possible)

parameters.name: shipping_options
parameters.description: Required if ok is True . A JSON-serialized array of available shipping options.

parameters.name: error_message
parameters.description: Required if ok is False . Error message in human readable form that explains why it is impossible to complete the order (e.g. “Sorry, delivery to your desired address is unavailable”). Telegram will display this message to the user.

methods.name: answerPreCheckoutQuery
methods.description: Once the user has confirmed their payment and shipping details, the Bot API sends the final confirmation in the form of an Update with the field pre_checkout_query . Use this method to respond to such pre-checkout queries. On success, True is returned. Note: The Bot API must receive an answer within 10 seconds after the pre-checkout query was sent.

parameters.name: pre_checkout_query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the query to be answered

parameters.name: ok
parameters.description: Specify True if everything is alright (goods are available, etc.) and the bot is ready to proceed with the order. Use False if there are any problems.

parameters.name: error_message
parameters.description: Required if ok is False . Error message in human readable form that explains the reason for failure to proceed with the checkout (e.g. "Sorry, somebody just bought the last of our amazing black T-shirts while you were busy filling out your payment details. Please choose a different color or garment!"). Telegram will display this message to the user.

methods.name: getMyStarBalance
methods.description: A method to get the current Telegram Stars balance of the bot. Requires no parameters. On success, returns a StarAmount object.

methods.name: getStarTransactions
methods.description: Returns the bot's Telegram Star transactions in chronological order. On success, returns a StarTransactions object.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of transactions to skip in the response

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of transactions to be retrieved. Values between 1-100 are accepted. Defaults to 100.

methods.name: refundStarPayment
methods.description: Refunds a successful payment in Telegram Stars . Returns True on success.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose payment will be refunded

parameters.name: telegram_payment_charge_id
parameters.description: Telegram payment identifier

methods.name: editUserStarSubscription
methods.description: Allows the bot to cancel or re-enable extension of a subscription paid in Telegram Stars. Returns True on success.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose subscription will be edited

parameters.name: telegram_payment_charge_id
parameters.description: Telegram payment identifier for the subscription

parameters.name: is_canceled
parameters.description: Pass True to cancel extension of the user subscription; the subscription must be active up to the end of the current subscription period. Pass False to allow the user to re-enable a subscription that was previously canceled by the bot.

methods.name: setPassportDataErrors
methods.description: Informs a user that some of the Telegram Passport elements they provided contains errors. The user will not be able to re-submit their Passport to you until the errors are fixed (the contents of the field for which you returned the error must change). Returns True on success. Use this if the data submitted by the user doesn't satisfy the standards your service requires for any reason. For example, if a birthday date seems invalid, a submitted document is blurry, a scan shows evidence of tampering, etc. Supply some details in the error message to make sure the user knows how to correct the issues.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User identifier

parameters.name: errors
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized array describing the errors

methods.name: sendGame
methods.description: Use this method to send a game. On success, the sent Message is returned.

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot in the format @username . Games can't be sent to channel direct messages chats and channel chats.

parameters.name: message_thread_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of a forum; for forum supergroups and private chats of bots with forum topic mode enabled only

parameters.name: game_short_name
parameters.description: Short name of the game, serves as the unique identifier for the game. Set up your games via @BotFather .

parameters.name: disable_notification
parameters.description: Sends the message silently . Users will receive a notification with no sound.

parameters.name: protect_content
parameters.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

parameters.name: allow_paid_broadcast
parameters.description: Pass True to allow up to 1000 messages per second, ignoring broadcasting limits for a fee of 0.1 Telegram Stars per message. The relevant Stars will be withdrawn from the bot's balance.

parameters.name: message_effect_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the message effect to be added to the message; for private chats only

parameters.name: reply_parameters
parameters.description: Description of the message to reply to

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for an inline keyboard . If empty, one 'Play game_title' button will be shown. If not empty, the first button must launch the game.

methods.name: setGameScore
methods.description: Use this method to set the score of the specified user in a game message. On success, if the message is not an inline message, the Message is returned, otherwise True is returned. Returns an error, if the new score is not greater than the user's current score in the chat and force is False .

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User identifier

parameters.name: score
parameters.description: New score, must be non-negative

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Pass True if the high score is allowed to decrease. This can be useful when fixing mistakes or banning cheaters.

parameters.name: disable_edit_message
parameters.description: Pass True if the game message should not be automatically edited to include the current scoreboard

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the sent message.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

methods.name: getGameHighScores
methods.description: Use this method to get data for high score tables. Will return the score of the specified user and several of their neighbors in a game. Returns an Array of GameHighScore objects. This method will currently return scores for the target user, plus two of their closest neighbors on each side. Will also return the top three users if the user and their neighbors are not among them. Please note that this behavior is subject to change.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Target user id

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the sent message.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

types.name: UserProfilePhotos
types.description: This object represent a user's profile pictures.

types.name: UserProfileAudios
types.description: This object represents the audios displayed on a user's profile.

types.name: File
types.description: This object represents a file ready to be downloaded. The file can be downloaded via the link https://api.telegram.org/file/bot<token>/<file_path> . It is guaranteed that the link will be valid for at least 1 hour. When the link expires, a new one can be requested by calling getFile . The maximum file size to download is 20 MB

types.name: WebAppInfo
types.description: Describes a Web App .

types.name: ReplyKeyboardMarkup
types.description: This object represents a custom keyboard with reply options (see Introduction to bots for details and examples). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a business account.

types.name: KeyboardButton
types.description: This object represents one button of the reply keyboard. At most one of the fields other than text , icon_custom_emoji_id , and style must be used to specify the type of the button. For simple text buttons, String can be used instead of this object to specify the button text.

types.name: KeyboardButtonRequestUsers
types.description: This object defines the criteria used to request suitable users. Information about the selected users will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. More about requesting users »

types.name: KeyboardButtonRequestChat
types.description: This object defines the criteria used to request a suitable chat. Information about the selected chat will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. The bot will be granted requested rights in the chat if appropriate. More about requesting chats » .

types.name: KeyboardButtonRequestManagedBot
types.description: This object defines the parameters for the creation of a managed bot. Information about the created bot will be shared with the bot using the update managed_bot and a Message with the field managed_bot_created .

types.name: KeyboardButtonPollType
types.description: This object represents type of a poll, which is allowed to be created and sent when the corresponding button is pressed.

types.name: ReplyKeyboardRemove
types.description: Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will remove the current custom keyboard and display the default letter-keyboard. By default, custom keyboards are displayed until a new keyboard is sent by a bot. An exception is made for one-time keyboards that are hidden immediately after the user presses a button (see ReplyKeyboardMarkup ). Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a business account.

types.name: InlineKeyboardMarkup
types.description: This object represents an inline keyboard that appears right next to the message it belongs to.

types.name: InlineKeyboardButton
types.description: This object represents one button of an inline keyboard. Exactly one of the fields other than text , icon_custom_emoji_id , and style must be used to specify the type of the button.

types.name: LoginUrl
types.description: This object represents a parameter of the inline keyboard button used to automatically authorize a user. Serves as a great replacement for the Telegram Login Widget when the user is coming from Telegram. All the user needs to do is tap/click a button and confirm that they want to log in: Telegram apps support these buttons as of version 5.7 . Sample bot: @discussbot

types.name: SwitchInlineQueryChosenChat
types.description: This object represents an inline button that switches the current user to inline mode in a chosen chat, with an optional default inline query.

types.name: CopyTextButton
types.description: This object represents an inline keyboard button that copies specified text to the clipboard.

types.name: CallbackQuery
types.description: This object represents an incoming callback query from a callback button in an inline keyboard . If the button that originated the query was attached to a message sent by the bot, the field message will be present. If the button was attached to a message sent via the bot (in inline mode ), the field inline_message_id will be present. Exactly one of the fields data or game_short_name will be present. NOTE: After the user presses a callback button, Telegram clients will display a progress bar until you call answerCallbackQuery . It is, therefore, necessary to react by calling answerCallbackQuery even if no notification to the user is needed (e.g., without specifying any of the optional parameters).

types.name: ForceReply
types.description: Upon receiving a message with this object, Telegram clients will display a reply interface to the user (act as if the user has selected the bot's message and tapped 'Reply'). This can be extremely useful if you want to create user-friendly step-by-step interfaces without having to sacrifice privacy mode . Not supported in channels and for messages sent on behalf of a user account. Example: A poll bot for groups runs in privacy mode (only receives commands, replies to its messages and mentions). There could be two ways to create a new poll: The last option is definitely more attractive. And if you use ForceReply in your bot's questions, it will receive the user's answers even if it only receives replies, commands and mentions - without any extra work for the user.

types.name: ChatPhoto
types.description: This object represents a chat photo.

types.name: ChatInviteLink
types.description: Represents an invite link for a chat.

types.name: ChatAdministratorRights
types.description: Represents the rights of an administrator in a chat.

types.name: ChatMemberUpdated
types.description: This object represents changes in the status of a chat member.

types.name: ChatMember
types.description: This object contains information about one member of a chat. Currently, the following 6 types of chat members are supported:

types.name: ChatMemberOwner
types.description: Represents a chat member that owns the chat and has all administrator privileges.

types.name: ChatMemberAdministrator
types.description: Represents a chat member that has some additional privileges.

types.name: ChatMemberMember
types.description: Represents a chat member that has no additional privileges or restrictions.

types.name: ChatMemberRestricted
types.description: Represents a chat member that is under certain restrictions in the chat. Supergroups only.

types.name: ChatMemberLeft
types.description: Represents a chat member that isn't currently a member of the chat, but may join it themselves.

types.name: ChatMemberBanned
types.description: Represents a chat member that was banned in the chat and can't return to the chat or view chat messages.

types.name: ChatJoinRequest
types.description: Represents a join request sent to a chat.

types.name: ChatPermissions
types.description: Describes actions that a non-administrator user is allowed to take in a chat.

types.name: Birthdate
types.description: Describes the birthdate of a user.

types.name: BusinessIntro
types.description: Contains information about the start page settings of a Telegram Business account.

types.name: BusinessLocation
types.description: Contains information about the location of a Telegram Business account.

types.name: BusinessOpeningHoursInterval
types.description: Describes an interval of time during which a business is open.

types.name: BusinessOpeningHours
types.description: Describes the opening hours of a business.

types.name: UserRating
types.description: This object describes the rating of a user based on their Telegram Star spendings.

types.name: StoryAreaPosition
types.description: Describes the position of a clickable area within a story.

types.name: LocationAddress
types.description: Describes the physical address of a location.

types.name: StoryAreaType
types.description: Describes the type of a clickable area on a story. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: StoryAreaTypeLocation
types.description: Describes a story area pointing to a location. Currently, a story can have up to 10 location areas.

types.name: StoryAreaTypeSuggestedReaction
types.description: Describes a story area pointing to a suggested reaction. Currently, a story can have up to 5 suggested reaction areas.

types.name: StoryAreaTypeLink
types.description: Describes a story area pointing to an HTTP or tg:// link. Currently, a story can have up to 3 link areas.

types.name: StoryAreaTypeWeather
types.description: Describes a story area containing weather information. Currently, a story can have up to 3 weather areas.

types.name: StoryAreaTypeUniqueGift
types.description: Describes a story area pointing to a unique gift. Currently, a story can have at most 1 unique gift area.

types.name: StoryArea
types.description: Describes a clickable area on a story media.

types.name: ChatLocation
types.description: Represents a location to which a chat is connected.

types.name: ReactionType
types.description: This object describes the type of a reaction. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: ReactionTypeEmoji
types.description: The reaction is based on an emoji.

types.name: ReactionTypeCustomEmoji
types.description: The reaction is based on a custom emoji.

types.name: ReactionTypePaid
types.description: The reaction is paid.

types.name: ReactionCount
types.description: Represents a reaction added to a message along with the number of times it was added.

types.name: MessageReactionUpdated
types.description: This object represents a change of a reaction on a message performed by a user.

types.name: MessageReactionCountUpdated
types.description: This object represents reaction changes on a message with anonymous reactions.

types.name: ForumTopic
types.description: This object represents a forum topic.

types.name: GiftBackground
types.description: This object describes the background of a gift.

types.name: Gift
types.description: This object represents a gift that can be sent by the bot.

types.name: Gifts
types.description: This object represent a list of gifts.

types.name: UniqueGiftModel
types.description: This object describes the model of a unique gift.

types.name: UniqueGiftSymbol
types.description: This object describes the symbol shown on the pattern of a unique gift.

types.name: UniqueGiftBackdropColors
types.description: This object describes the colors of the backdrop of a unique gift.

types.name: UniqueGiftBackdrop
types.description: This object describes the backdrop of a unique gift.

types.name: UniqueGiftColors
types.description: This object contains information about the color scheme for a user's name, message replies and link previews based on a unique gift.

types.name: UniqueGift
types.description: This object describes a unique gift that was upgraded from a regular gift.

types.name: GiftInfo
types.description: Describes a service message about a regular gift that was sent or received.

types.name: UniqueGiftInfo
types.description: Describes a service message about a unique gift that was sent or received.

types.name: OwnedGift
types.description: This object describes a gift received and owned by a user or a chat. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: OwnedGiftRegular
types.description: Describes a regular gift owned by a user or a chat.

types.name: OwnedGiftUnique
types.description: Describes a unique gift received and owned by a user or a chat.

types.name: OwnedGifts
types.description: Contains the list of gifts received and owned by a user or a chat.

types.name: BotAccessSettings
types.description: This object describes the access settings of a bot.

types.name: AcceptedGiftTypes
types.description: This object describes the types of gifts that can be gifted to a user or a chat.

types.name: StarAmount
types.description: Describes an amount of Telegram Stars.

types.name: BotCommand
types.description: This object represents a bot command.

types.name: BotCommandScope
types.description: This object represents the scope to which bot commands are applied. Currently, the following 7 scopes are supported:

types.name: BotCommandScopeDefault
types.description: Represents the default scope of bot commands. Default commands are used if no commands with a narrower scope are specified for the user.

types.name: BotCommandScopeAllPrivateChats
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering all private chats.

types.name: BotCommandScopeAllGroupChats
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering all group and supergroup chats.

types.name: BotCommandScopeAllChatAdministrators
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering all group and supergroup chat administrators.

types.name: BotCommandScopeChat
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering a specific chat.

types.name: BotCommandScopeChatAdministrators
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering all administrators of a specific group or supergroup chat.

types.name: BotCommandScopeChatMember
types.description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering a specific member of a group or supergroup chat.

types.name: BotName
types.description: This object represents the bot's name.

types.name: BotDescription
types.description: This object represents the bot's description.

types.name: BotShortDescription
types.description: This object represents the bot's short description.

types.name: MenuButton
types.description: This object describes the bot's menu button in a private chat. It should be one of If a menu button other than MenuButtonDefault is set for a private chat, then it is applied in the chat. Otherwise the default menu button is applied. By default, the menu button opens the list of bot commands.

types.name: MenuButtonCommands
types.description: Represents a menu button, which opens the bot's list of commands.

types.name: MenuButtonWebApp
types.description: Represents a menu button, which launches a Web App .

types.name: MenuButtonDefault
types.description: Describes that no specific value for the menu button was set.

types.name: ChatBoostSource
types.description: This object describes the source of a chat boost. It can be one of

types.name: ChatBoostSourcePremium
types.description: The boost was obtained by subscribing to Telegram Premium or by gifting a Telegram Premium subscription to another user.

types.name: ChatBoostSourceGiftCode
types.description: The boost was obtained by the creation of Telegram Premium gift codes to boost a chat. Each such code boosts the chat 4 times for the duration of the corresponding Telegram Premium subscription.

types.name: ChatBoostSourceGiveaway
types.description: The boost was obtained by the creation of a Telegram Premium or a Telegram Star giveaway. This boosts the chat 4 times for the duration of the corresponding Telegram Premium subscription for Telegram Premium giveaways and prize_star_count / 500 times for one year for Telegram Star giveaways.

types.name: ChatBoost
types.description: This object contains information about a chat boost.

types.name: ChatBoostUpdated
types.description: This object represents a boost added to a chat or changed.

types.name: ChatBoostRemoved

types.name: ChatOwnerLeft

types.name: ChatOwnerChanged
types.description: Describes a service message about an ownership change in the chat.

types.name: UserChatBoosts
types.description: This object represents a list of boosts added to a chat by a user.

types.name: BusinessBotRights
types.description: Represents the rights of a business bot.

types.name: BusinessConnection
types.description: Describes the connection of the bot with a business account.

types.name: BusinessMessagesDeleted
types.description: This object is received when messages are deleted from a connected business account.

types.name: SentWebAppMessage
types.description: Describes an inline message sent by a Web App on behalf of a user.

types.name: SentGuestMessage
types.description: Describes an inline message sent by a guest bot.

types.name: PreparedInlineMessage
types.description: Describes an inline message to be sent by a user of a Mini App.

types.name: PreparedKeyboardButton
types.description: Describes a keyboard button to be used by a user of a Mini App.

types.name: ResponseParameters
types.description: Describes why a request was unsuccessful.

types.name: InputMedia
types.description: This object represents the content of a media message to be sent. It should be one of

types.name: InputMediaAnimation
types.description: Represents an animation file (GIF or H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound) to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaAudio
types.description: Represents an audio file to be treated as music to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaDocument
types.description: Represents a general file to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaLink
types.description: Represents an HTTP link to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaLivePhoto
types.description: Represents a live photo to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaLocation
types.description: Represents a location to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaPhoto

types.name: InputMediaSticker

types.name: InputMediaVenue
types.description: Represents a venue to be sent.

types.name: InputMediaVideo
types.description: Represents a video to be sent.

types.name: InputFile
types.description: This object represents the contents of a file to be uploaded. Must be posted using multipart/form-data in the usual way that files are uploaded via the browser.

types.name: InputPaidMedia
types.description: This object describes the paid media to be sent. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: InputPaidMediaLivePhoto

types.name: InputPaidMediaPhoto

types.name: InputPaidMediaVideo

types.name: InputProfilePhoto
types.description: This object describes a profile photo to set. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: InputProfilePhotoStatic
types.description: A static profile photo in the .JPG format.

types.name: InputProfilePhotoAnimated

types.name: InputStoryContent

types.name: InputStoryContentVideo

types.name: Sticker
types.description: This object represents a sticker.

types.name: StickerSet

types.name: MaskPosition

types.name: InputSticker

types.name: RichTextBold

types.name: RichTextItalic

types.name: RichTextUnderline
types.description: An underlined text.

types.name: RichTextStrikethrough
types.description: A strikethrough text.

types.name: RichTextSpoiler

types.name: RichTextDateTime

types.name: RichTextTextMention

types.name: RichTextSubscript
types.description: A subscript text.

types.name: RichTextSuperscript
types.description: A superscript text.

types.name: RichTextMarked
types.description: A marked text.

types.name: RichTextCode
types.description: A monowidth text.

types.name: RichTextCustomEmoji

types.name: RichTextMathematicalExpression

types.name: RichTextUrl

types.name: RichTextEmailAddress

types.name: RichTextPhoneNumber

types.name: RichTextBankCardNumber

types.name: RichTextMention

types.name: RichTextHashtag

types.name: RichTextCashtag

types.name: RichTextBotCommand

types.name: RichTextAnchor

types.name: RichTextAnchorLink

types.name: RichTextReference

types.name: RichBlockCaption

types.name: RichBlockTableCell

types.name: RichBlockListItem

types.name: RichBlock
types.description: This object represents a block in a rich formatted message. Currently, it can be any of the following types:

types.name: RichBlockParagraph
types.description:
A text paragraph, corresponding to the HTML tag

.

types.name: RichBlockSectionHeading
types.description: A section heading, corresponding to the HTML tags <h1> , <h2> , <h3> , <h4> , <h5> , or <h6> .

types.name: RichBlockPreformatted
types.description: A preformatted text block, corresponding to the nested HTML tags <pre> and <code> .

types.name: RichBlockFooter

types.name: RichBlockDivider
types.description: A divider, corresponding to the HTML tag <hr/> .

types.name: RichBlockMathematicalExpression

types.name: RichBlockAnchor
types.description: A block with an anchor, corresponding to the HTML tag <a> with the attribute name .

types.name: RichBlockList
types.description: A list of blocks, corresponding to the HTML tag <ul> or <ol> with multiple nested tags <li> .

types.name: RichBlockBlockQuotation

types.name: RichBlockPullQuotation

types.name: RichBlockCollage

types.name: RichBlockSlideshow

types.name: RichBlockTable
types.description: A table, corresponding to the HTML tag <table> .

types.name: RichBlockDetails

types.name: RichBlockMap

types.name: RichBlockAnimation

types.name: RichBlockAudio

types.name: RichBlockPhoto
types.description: A block with a photo, corresponding to the HTML tag .

types.name: RichBlockVideo

types.name: RichBlockVoiceNote

types.name: RichBlockThinking

The block may be used only in sendRichMessageDraft , therefore it can't be received in messages. See https://t.me/addemoji/AIActions for examples of custom emoji, which are recommended for usage in the block.

types.name: InlineQuery
types.description: This object represents an incoming inline query. When the user sends an empty query, your bot could return some default or trending results.

types.name: InlineQueryResultsButton
types.description: This object represents a button to be shown above inline query results. You must use exactly one of the optional fields.

types.name: InlineQueryResult
types.description: This object represents one result of an inline query. Telegram clients currently support results of the following 20 types: Note: All URLs passed in inline query results will be available to end users and therefore must be assumed to be public .

types.name: InlineQueryResultArticle
types.description: Represents a link to an article or web page.

types.name: InlineQueryResultPhoto
types.description: Represents a link to a photo. By default, this photo will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the photo.

types.name: InlineQueryResultGif
types.description: Represents a link to an animated GIF file. By default, this animated GIF file will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

types.name: InlineQueryResultMpeg4Gif
types.description: Represents a link to a video animation (H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound). By default, this animated MPEG-4 file will be sent by the user with optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

types.name: InlineQueryResultVideo
types.description: Represents a link to a page containing an embedded video player or a video file. By default, this video file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the video. If an InlineQueryResultVideo message contains an embedded video (e.g., YouTube), you must replace its content using input_message_content .

types.name: InlineQueryResultAudio
types.description: Represents a link to an MP3 audio file. By default, this audio file will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the audio.

types.name: InlineQueryResultVoice
types.description: Represents a link to a voice recording in an .OGG container encoded with OPUS. By default, this voice recording will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the the voice message.

types.name: InlineQueryResultDocument
types.description: Represents a link to a file. By default, this file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the file. Currently, only .PDF and .ZIP files can be sent using this method.

types.name: InlineQueryResultLocation
types.description: Represents a location on a map. By default, the location will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the location.

types.name: InlineQueryResultVenue
types.description: Represents a venue. By default, the venue will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the venue.

types.name: InlineQueryResultContact
types.description: Represents a contact with a phone number. By default, this contact will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the contact.

types.name: InlineQueryResultGame
types.description: Represents a Game .

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedPhoto
types.description: Represents a link to a photo stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this photo will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the photo.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedGif
types.description: Represents a link to an animated GIF file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this animated GIF file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with specified content instead of the animation.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedMpeg4Gif
types.description: Represents a link to a video animation (H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound) stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this animated MPEG-4 file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the animation.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedSticker
types.description: Represents a link to a sticker stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this sticker will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the sticker.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedDocument
types.description: Represents a link to a file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the file.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedVideo
types.description: Represents a link to a video file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this video file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the video.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedVoice
types.description: Represents a link to a voice message stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this voice message will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the voice message.

types.name: InlineQueryResultCachedAudio
types.description: Represents a link to an MP3 audio file stored on the Telegram servers. By default, this audio file will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the audio.

types.name: InputRichMessageContent

types.name: InputLocationMessageContent
types.description: Represents the content of a location message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

types.name: InputVenueMessageContent
types.description: Represents the content of a venue message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

types.name: InputContactMessageContent
types.description: Represents the content of a contact message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

types.name: InputInvoiceMessageContent
types.description: Represents the content of an invoice message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

types.name: ChosenInlineResult
types.description: Represents a result of an inline query that was chosen by the user and sent to their chat partner. Note: It is necessary to enable inline feedback via @BotFather in order to receive these objects in updates.

types.name: LabeledPrice
types.description: This object represents a portion of the price for goods or services.

types.name: Invoice
types.description: This object contains basic information about an invoice.

types.name: ShippingAddress
types.description: This object represents a shipping address.

types.name: OrderInfo
types.description: This object represents information about an order.

types.name: ShippingOption
types.description: This object represents one shipping option.

types.name: SuccessfulPayment
types.description: This object contains basic information about a successful payment. Note that if the buyer initiates a chargeback with the relevant payment provider following this transaction, the funds may be debited from your balance. This is outside of Telegram's control.

types.name: RefundedPayment
types.description: This object contains basic information about a refunded payment.

types.name: ShippingQuery
types.description: This object contains information about an incoming shipping query.

types.name: PreCheckoutQuery
types.description: This object contains information about an incoming pre-checkout query.

types.name: PaidMediaPurchased
types.description: This object contains information about a paid media purchase.

types.name: RevenueWithdrawalState
types.description: This object describes the state of a revenue withdrawal operation. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: RevenueWithdrawalStatePending
types.description: The withdrawal is in progress.

types.name: RevenueWithdrawalStateSucceeded
types.description: The withdrawal succeeded.

types.name: RevenueWithdrawalStateFailed
types.description: The withdrawal failed and the transaction was refunded.

types.name: AffiliateInfo
types.description: Contains information about the affiliate that received a commission via this transaction.

types.name: TransactionPartner
types.description: This object describes the source of a transaction, or its recipient for outgoing transactions. Currently, it can be one of

types.name: TransactionPartnerUser
types.description: Describes a transaction with a user.

types.name: TransactionPartnerChat
types.description: Describes a transaction with a chat.

types.name: TransactionPartnerAffiliateProgram
types.description: Describes the affiliate program that issued the affiliate commission received via this transaction.

types.name: TransactionPartnerFragment
types.description: Describes a withdrawal transaction with Fragment.

types.name: TransactionPartnerTelegramAds
types.description: Describes a withdrawal transaction to the Telegram Ads platform.

types.name: TransactionPartnerTelegramApi
types.description: Describes a transaction with payment for paid broadcasting .

types.name: TransactionPartnerOther
types.description: Describes a transaction with an unknown source or recipient.

types.name: StarTransaction
types.description: Describes a Telegram Star transaction. Note that if the buyer initiates a chargeback with the payment provider from whom they acquired Stars (e.g., Apple, Google) following this transaction, the refunded Stars will be deducted from the bot's balance. This is outside of Telegram's control.

types.name: StarTransactions
types.description: Contains a list of Telegram Star transactions.

types.name: PassportData
types.description: Describes Telegram Passport data shared with the bot by the user.

types.name: PassportFile
types.description: This object represents a file uploaded to Telegram Passport. Currently all Telegram Passport files are in JPEG format when decrypted and don't exceed 10MB.

types.name: EncryptedPassportElement
types.description: Describes documents or other Telegram Passport elements shared with the bot by the user.

types.name: EncryptedCredentials
types.description: Describes data required for decrypting and authenticating EncryptedPassportElement . See the Telegram Passport Documentation for a complete description of the data decryption and authentication processes.

types.name: PassportElementError
types.description: This object represents an error in the Telegram Passport element which was submitted that should be resolved by the user. It should be one of:

types.name: PassportElementErrorDataField
types.description: Represents an issue in one of the data fields that was provided by the user. The error is considered resolved when the field's value changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorFrontSide
types.description: Represents an issue with the front side of a document. The error is considered resolved when the file with the front side of the document changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorReverseSide
types.description: Represents an issue with the reverse side of a document. The error is considered resolved when the file with reverse side of the document changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorSelfie
types.description: Represents an issue with the selfie with a document. The error is considered resolved when the file with the selfie changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorFile
types.description: Represents an issue with a document scan. The error is considered resolved when the file with the document scan changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorFiles
types.description: Represents an issue with a list of scans. The error is considered resolved when the list of files containing the scans changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorTranslationFile
types.description: Represents an issue with one of the files that constitute the translation of a document. The error is considered resolved when the file changes.

types.name: PassportElementErrorTranslationFiles
types.description: Represents an issue with the translated version of a document. The error is considered resolved when a file with the document translation change.

types.name: PassportElementErrorUnspecified
types.description: Represents an issue in an unspecified place. The error is considered resolved when new data is added.

types.name: Game
types.description: This object represents a game. Use BotFather to create and edit games, their short names will act as unique identifiers.

types.name: CallbackGame
types.description: A placeholder, currently holds no information. Use BotFather to set up your game.

types.name: GameHighScore
types.description: This object represents one row of the high scores table for a game. And that's about all we've got for now. If you've got any questions, please check out our Bot FAQ »
